CATaN 0.1.0
  • Reference
  • Articles
    • CATaN: Canonical correlation Analysis of Transcriptome and TF-gene regulatory Networks
  • Changelog

Accessor generics for CATaN classes

Source: R/AllGenerics.R
CATaN-accessors.Rd

Generic accessor functions for CATaNResult and CATaNAnnotation objects.

tfsampleLoading(object)

trasampleLoading(object)

ccParameters(object)

snpScores(object)

topSnps(object)

bottomSnps(object)

# S4 method for class 'CATaNResult'
tfsampleLoading(object)

# S4 method for class 'CATaNResult'
trasampleLoading(object)

# S4 method for class 'CATaNResult'
ccParameters(object)

# S4 method for class 'CATaNAnnotation'
snpScores(object)

# S4 method for class 'CATaNAnnotation'
topSnps(object)

# S4 method for class 'CATaNAnnotation'
bottomSnps(object)

Arguments

object

A CATaNResult or CATaNAnnotation object.

Value

A DataFrame or list depending on the accessor.

Examples

set.seed(42)
tf <- matrix(sample(0:1, 500, replace = TRUE), 50, 10)
rownames(tf) <- paste0("g", seq_len(50))
colnames(tf) <- paste0("TF", seq_len(10))
ex <- matrix(rnorm(250), 50, 5)
rownames(ex) <- rownames(tf)
colnames(ex) <- paste0("s", seq_len(5))
res <- run_cca(tf, ex, n_cc = 3L, n_hvg = 30L,
               verbose = FALSE)
tfsampleLoading(res)
#> DataFrame with 10 rows and 3 columns
#>      CC1_rotation CC2_rotation CC3_rotation
#>         <numeric>    <numeric>    <numeric>
#> TF1    -0.1740764   -0.0291873   -0.1771026
#> TF2    -0.1010926   -0.2773494   -0.6237961
#> TF3     0.4208616    0.1981585   -0.0616655
#> TF4     0.1278574    0.0134319   -0.0990823
#> TF5     0.0460205   -0.0549510    0.5007185
#> TF6     0.2848676   -0.6749393    0.0545636
#> TF7    -0.3431099   -0.1414350    0.4389252
#> TF8    -0.6861021    0.2250652   -0.0907274
#> TF9     0.1894985    0.3498847    0.2510683
#> TF10    0.2415947    0.4807682   -0.2197152
trasampleLoading(res)
#> DataFrame with 5 rows and 3 columns
#>    CC1_rotation CC2_rotation CC3_rotation
#>       <numeric>    <numeric>    <numeric>
#> s1    -0.604552   0.01636595   -0.2827174
#> s2     0.492925  -0.44295184    0.4581997
#> s3     0.285832  -0.40463635   -0.5840243
#> s4     0.429377   0.79987102   -0.0349598
#> s5    -0.354227  -0.00126431    0.6064795
ccParameters(res)
#> DataFrame with 5 rows and 3 columns
#>                              CC1       CC2       CC3
#>                        <numeric> <numeric> <numeric>
#> transcriptome_variance  0.434688  0.164068  0.225867
#> tf_variance             0.121362  0.185988  0.143760
#> sv_proportion           0.387380  0.301176  0.199552
#> scf                     0.511968  0.309462  0.135856
#> canonical_correlation   0.679777  0.680667  0.457176
